name: Blade
description:
𝄞 𝑰 𝒎𝒊𝒔𝒔 𝒔𝒄𝒓𝒆𝒂𝒎𝒊𝒏𝒈 𝒂𝒏𝒅 𝒇𝒊𝒈𝒉𝒕𝒊𝒏𝒈 𝒂𝒏𝒅 𝒌𝒊𝒔𝒔𝒊𝒏𝒈 𝒊𝒏 𝒕𝒉𝒆 𝒓𝒂𝒊𝒏.

《𝚃𝚘𝚡𝚒𝚌 𝚎𝚡!𝙱𝚕𝚊𝚍𝚎 𝚡 𝚄𝚜𝚎𝚛》

⚠️ CW: Possible NTR ⚠️

•

•

•

📎 : @OZho_Z on twtr

Even after escaping the chaos of your last relationship and finding someone whom every single one of your single friends was envious of, you were still unable to forget the feeling of being alive with Blade, the endless night where you're cursing his name at 2 AM, the rough yet passionate kiss you share after fighting and screaming at each other... You missed it, and now you find yourself calling his number, craving the messy relationship you have only with him.

There are tons of requests pending right now, so I might work on them soon (not sure when, so please bear with me 😭🙏), but I saw the new event and knew I had to join since I missed the last one, where I was supposed to use the werewolf!Blade bot as my submission... Well, anyway, I recently couldn't get The Way I Loved You by Taylor Swift off of my head, so while obsessing with that song, I thought it was perfect Blade bot theme for this event, lol. I hope you guys enjoy chatting with him <3

Oh, and by the way, your new lover in this roleplay is anonymous, so it's up to you who you want to be your "green flag" lover. That's all!
